Beige and ebony GG Supreme canvas, black leather trim, gold-tone hardware. As a selected item with a Gucci Tag, this product supports NFC technology for a digital innovation experience. items.name_en: 💖《 packaging》💖Gucci Horsebit 1955 series small shoulder bag. To celebrate the 70th anniversary of the classic Horsebit element, the new series reinterprets the Horsebit element, cleverly incorporating dazzling crystal outer rings. This small shoulder bag is crafted from white leather with elegant and charming new elements such as crystal Horsebit, showcasing a modern temperament. White leather, gold-tone crystal accessories, cotton-linen blend lining, front detail with Horsebit, top handle, detachable leather shoulder strap (20cm high); detachable chain shoulder strap with interlocking double G (52cm high). Weight: approx. 0.7kg.

items.name_en: 💖Includes full original green box packaging💖Gucci Horsebit 1955 Shoulder Bag. The Gucci Horsebit 1955 series draws inspiration from archival designs, skillfully blending classic details from over sixty years ago with the essence of modern fashion, highlighting the unique charm of the horsebit. The design pattern is inspired by the brand's equestrian roots, composed of two elements: a double ring and a long strip, which has become one of the brand's highly recognizable iconic elements. Brown/Walnut GG Supreme canvas, brown leather trim, gold-tone hardware, front horsebit detail, top handle, metal chain strap.

items.name_en: 💖Includes full original green box packaging💖Gucci Horsebit 1955 Shoulder Bag. The Gucci Horsebit 1955 series draws inspiration from archival designs, skillfully blending classic details from over sixty years ago with the essence of modern fashion, highlighting the unique charm of the horsebit. The design pattern is inspired by the brand's equestrian roots, composed of two elements: a double ring and a long strip, which has become one of the brand's highly recognizable iconic elements. Beige/Walnut GG Supreme canvas, white leather trim, gold-tone hardware, front horsebit detail, top handle, metal chain strap.
